# Data Source: auth0_rate_limit_policies

Data source to retrieve Rate Limit Policies, optionally filtered by resource, consumer, or consumer selector. (EA only)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "auth0_rate_limit_policies" "filtered" {
  resource          = "oauth_authentication_api"
  consumer          = "client"
  consumer_selector = "default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `consumer` (String) Filter policies by consumer. Requires `resource` to also be set. (EA only)
- `consumer_selector` (String) Filter policies by consumer selector. Requires `consumer` to also be set. (EA only)
- `resource` (String) Filter policies by resource. (EA only)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `rate_limit_policies` (List of Object) List of Rate Limit Policies matching the filter criteria. (EA only) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rate_limit_policies))

<a id="nestedatt--rate_limit_policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rate_limit_policies`

Read-Only:

- `configuration` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--rate_limit_policies--configuration))
- `consumer` (String)
- `consumer_selector` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `resource` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--rate_limit_policies--configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rate_limit_policies.configuration`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String)
- `limit` (Number)
- `redirect_uri` (String)
